summary: Beachgoers are being urged to stay out of dangerous surf after Clearwater Beach lifeguards made more than a dozen water rescues in recent days.

title: St. Pete man arrested after 12-year-old girl gives birth to his baby at park: Police
summary: Officers arrested a St. Petersburg man after a 12-year-old girl unexpectedly gave birth at Helen Howarth park last Thursday, revealing a history of abuse by a relative, according to Pinellas Park police.

title: St. Pete Beach seminar to explain Florida beach access law
summary: If you’ve ever wondered where the public beach ends and private property begins, St. Pete Beach officials hope to answer that question.

title: Trump says nuclear deal hinges on Saudi Arabia normalizing ties with Israel
summary: President Donald Trump said on Thursday that a new agreement with Saudi Arabia for a civilian nuclear program will require the kingdom to normalize relations with Israel through the Abraham Accords.

title: Oil prices hover near $100 a barrel after attacks on Saudi oil tankers
summary: Oil prices are jumping again Thursday as increased fighting in the Middle East threatens to slow the global flow of crude.

title: House passes resolution directing Trump to end hostilities with Iran
summary: The House passed a largely symbolic resolution directing President Donald Trump to end hostilities with Iran without congressional approval.

title: Fruit puree pouches sold at stores nationwide recalled for possible plastic contamination
summary: Fruit puree pouches sold nationwide at Kroger, Meijer, and Target stores have been recalled for possible plastic contamination, according to an alert posted by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration.

title: Seniors to play outsized role in tight Georgia races, new poll finds
summary: A new poll of voters in the key battleground state of Georgia released Thursday shows incumbent Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff with a clear lead over Republican challenger Rep. Mike Collins.

title: Rubio says Iran 'not ready to make a deal' as US strikes continue
summary: Secretary of State Rubio says Iran is "not ready to make a deal" as US military strikes enter a 12th consecutive night.
